summary: A small rectangular bunker-like structure with a sunken foundation. The building features a brick main wall with stone accents, a white concrete foundation platform, and a dark wooden or obsidian roof. The structure appears to be partially recessed into the ground with a flat top opening.
rebuild_hints: Excavate a rectangular pit approximately 10×14 blocks
Build white concrete platform as foundation base layer
Construct brick walls (red brick) as primary wall material
Add stonebrick accent band horizontally across mid-wall
Place dark wood or obsidian blocks as roof/top trim
Leave top open or use dark blocks for roof
Ensure bilateral symmetry along the length
Add dirt/grass surroundings at ground level
uncertainties: Exact interior layout not visible from exterior views
Precise roof material (dark wood vs obsidian) uncertain
Exact height of sunken foundation depth unclear
Whether structure is completely hollow or has internal features
Exact block count for stone accent band pattern
